title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. apiculatum
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. apiculatum, also known as Yellow Buttons or Billy Buttons, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. apiculatum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. apiculatum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource for natural medicine.
